calendar.matters:
To Compel An Accounting And For Order Removing Trustee;
Off Calendar Jan-21-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Whitcomb, Jr. in Propria Persona.

Mr. Whitcomb confirmed that he was not a Beneficiary and that he was not the Trustee. In addition, he stated that his children were the Beneficiaries and that he filed a petition to be appointed as the Guardian but that his request was denied. The Court informed Mr. Whitcomb that he had no legal standing to bring the petition before the Court and advised him to seek legal Counsel. The Court also informed Mr. Whitcomb that he needed to have an Attorney representing him in order to be appointed as a Guardian Ad Litem. The matter was taken off calendar.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

To Compel An Accounting And For Order Removing Trustee;
Off Calendar Dec-10-2008 Continued To Jan-21-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (3532 San Bruno Ave., San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Mar-17-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Raymond Levy for the Petitioner.

The Court stated that it had received a waiver from the Tax Collector. The sale was confirmed at $565,000.00. No bond was required. Mr. Levy provided clarification as to the amount of the deposit. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge Pro Tem: Sue M .Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Hill.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (14162 Woodland Ave., Guerneville, Ca)
Off Calendar Jan-09-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Soto for Kenneth Whitcomb (Trustee).

The sale is confirmed at $380,000.00. No additional bond is required. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.

Petn. To Find That Assets Are Property Of Trust
Off Calendar Jan-02-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Ex Parte Petition To Shorten Time For Date Of Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Denied
